name: Reliving the Past Through Time Travel

attachments.extracted_content:
INT. VOLTEC OFFICE COMMERCIAL
A lady talking to the camera walking through Voltec offices.
Voltec a time traveling company that let you relive you past in
3rd person.
LADY #1
Do you wish you could simply travel
back in time? Re-live the best day of
your life? Well here at Voltec
CAMERA ZOOMS OUT REVILING IT WAS A COMMERCIAL.
Don presses the skip button to watch his youtube as he eats his
lunch in the break room of Intercity Cellphones. As he is eating
his lunch a timer goes off. That say "back to work" Don walks
back to his cubical and starts to work at his job that he hates
INT. JERRYS' HOUSE
Don Knocks on Jerry's Door
JERRY
What’s up Don
DON
What up Jerry
Don walks straight to the fridge and grabs a beer
JERRY
Dude remember Sarah
DON
Renner?
JERRY
No... no Sarah with the big tits
DON
I do Remember her! What ever happened
to her?
JERRY
I don’t know. I just can’t get over the
rack she had on her. It was like two
big ass melons ready to pop!

DON
Remember Jessica?
JERRY
The one that supposedly was down for
you. Ya I remember her.
DON
She was bro I promise (laughing)
JERRY
Ya and Ms. Hunter gave me the golden
ticket after the homecoming dance
DON
No, I’m serious. She was. It was the
last day of spring break. I just got my
car and she wanted to “check it out” I
was little nervous because we never
talk much prior to that.
JERRY
Okay
DON
So, I picked her up from her cousin
Jane's house she told her mom she was
going to spend the night. It was
probably 9:00 o'clock we talked for
hours next thing you knew it was three
in the morning and Neither of us were
tired. She started telling me about the
things going on with her parents and
how she doesn't know what college she's
gonna go to we really connected.
JERRY

Ya ya. Get to the point.
DON
As the night started to go on, I just
said **** it and leaned in and gave her
a kiss. Next thing you know we started
making out one thing led to another and
boom
JERRY
What happen? You can’t leave me hangin.
DON
I left my condom in my wallet and I
forgot my wallet at home. So, nothing
ended up happening.
JERRY
You guys didn't talk after that?
DON
No, it's kind of weird like I would see
her around school and say “Hi” and she
kind of acted like she never knew me
JERRY
Ah I still don't believe you.
DON
Don't
JERRY
I wish we could go back to those times
man. No worries, no problems, just
school and girls.
DON

Just School for me.
JERRY
I miss it. I am not gonna lie.
DON
Anyways I gotta go now I gotta be up
early in the morning.
JERRY
Alright man. You good to drive home? Ya
I’ll be fine.
Jerry walks him out
INT. DONS APARTMENT
Don is waking up to his alarm. He is late for work.Starts to get
ready for work. Drives to work. At work he gets a call from
Jerry.
JERRY
Don! Don! I got it! I know how we are
going to do it.
DON
Do What? Jerry, what are you talking
about?
JERRY
It's not a thing Don. Its a company
that lets you go back in time.
DON
I still don’t know what you're talking
about?

JERRY
It's a company down in the boonies
somewhere that they put you into this
one tank and you can go back in time
you just can't talk to yourself.
DON
No I think that's the plot for
Terminator
JERRY
Would you just listen to me for once
DON
In case you haven't noticed I did
listen to you and that's why I'm
working for local tech support And
you're working at a law firm.
JERRY
Don you have to stop blaming other
people for your choices? Anyway, let's
do it. Let's check it out.
DON
Why would I want to go back Jerry? I’m
Trying to fix the future.
JERRY
Come on man!
DON
I gotta go Jerry.
JERRY
Don’t hang up on me Don.
DON
Bye Jerry
JERRY
If You hang up this phone we are done.
I never wanna see your face again.
DON HANGS UP THE PHONE

JERRY
Hello! Hello! Dammit.
INT./EXT. DONS HOUSE
After a long day of work Don is going into his fridge looking
for a beer he only finds one. He goes to sit down on his couch.
He hears a knock at his door.
JERRY
(Knock on Dons door)
Don open up! I know you're in there!
hello! don't make me break this door
down because I swear to God I'll do it.
Don opens door.
DON
Jerry I don't want to go to your stupid
“back to the future” retreat.
Jerry enters
JERRY
That's not why I'm here.
DON
It's not?
JERRY
Of course that's why I'm here. Don when
are you going to do something fun for
once you're always cooped up in this
environment drinking beer and watching
“How I Met your mother”. Don't you ever
want to try something new? Have a new
experience? Who cares if this is a scam
let's just do it.
DON

I get out. And plus I don't have money
to really spend on something that I
don't know’s gonna work for sure.
JERRY
I got you, you don't have to pay for
anything. I just don't want to do it by
myself. But it looks legit for real.
There's like 20 reviews that are all
five stars and one one star review so
you know it's true.
DON
What did the one star review say?
(don reads the review)
“when I walked in I was not greeted I
did not know where I was going. It was
not till 5 minutes later that a worker
came up to me with an attitude. It was
9:00 AM and I was not ready for that

JERRY
See it still happened, she went back
and saw her memory.
DON
So what do they do? They just put it on
a TV screen and you get to see your
memory.
JERRY
From what I've seen they give you a new

tank looking thing and you wait there
for 30 second and you're there.

DON
So you teleport?
JERRY
I really don't know. Let's just do it.
DON
How much is it?
JERRY
Don’t worry about it I got you
DON
Jerry how much is it
JERRY
It's 10 grand
Don flips out
DON
10 grand you know what I can do with 10
grand. That's way too much money. What
if this thing doesn't even work out the
way we want it to.
JERRY
It’s a steal. Its 10 grand for three
memories
DON
I can't let you spend 10 grand on me,

JERRY

No, I don't want to go by myself,
that's why I don't mind paying for you
to come with me. What if they kill me

DON
So it's better they kill us both?
JERRY
I'm not saying that I'm saying if that
does happen, we have a higher chance of
living.
Looks at jerry because he knows he sold them on this idea
DON
Damn. All right.
JERRY
We're going to the past baby!
DON
We're going to the past.
JERRY
We're going to the past! I'll be here
to pick you up in the morning.
DON
Wait what?
JERRY
Yeah, tomorrow 8:00 o'clock I already
have a schedule.
DON

What if I said no?
JERRY
You're not going to say no to me, I'm
Jerry Cooper the 3rd. See you tomorrow
at 8:00
INT./EXT. DONS HOUSE
Early in the morning Don is getting ready for the day he's just

DON
(picks up the phone)
what's up. I'll be right there.

Don and Jerry are pulling up to the place it looks a bit

Where are we getting off right here?
JERRY
(smiling super excited)
This is the place

This is the place?!? I'm out!
pulls Dawn's arm and talks to him

can you stop being a b**** for once

I'm not being a b**** Jerry, don't you

Just chill. I left my location on. I

DON
That's not going to do s*** when we're

Dude, just chill. Let's just go in

DON
If I don't feel good about it I'm

JERRY
Cool. Let go.
They go into Voltec Greeted by a young lady with super high

JASMINE
Hello you must be Jerry
DON
Im Donald he Jerry
Don point to Jerry. Jasmine looks Jerry.
JASMINE

Hello you must be Jerry!
JERRY
Yes, and you are?

Jasmine, Well come on down we have the

Don looks at Jerry with fear in his eyes
JERRY
(Whispers to Don)
She seems like a nice person
DON
(Whispers to Jerry)
You know who also seemed like a nice

Okay gentlemen take off your clothes

No, No it just sounded like you said

uh.. Okay

This one's for you and this one's for

what do you mean bring you back to the

you don't know? these Chambers are

october 13th thats-

ya homecoming

we're not reliving the moment Jerry

how did I know you were going to do

remember never to interact with

Okay so both of you guys can enter,

all righty gentleman buckle up your

1

ARTUM
You must go back and do what you agree

Yes. Just watch it.
JERRY
Okay that fine. We will go back and

Shut up Jerry. Jasmine and get their

Jasmine is more serious now. She hands them there disguises.

This one is for you and this one is for
you.
Don looks the disguises it the same as the as the last. Jerry

JERRY
Hey Jasmine I think you gave me the

JASMINE
No that is the right one.
Jerry try's to shout at Artum.
JERRY
Excuse me sir, aren’t I suppose to wear

ARTUM
You are wearing the same thing.
JERRY
I am pretty sure I didn’t wear this
last time.
ARTUM
You wore it though
He looks back and realize that this was the same thing that he
wore when he went back in time the second time.
ARTUM
Did you think you think Donald was the
only one that had to go back.
(Looks at Jasmine)
Jasmine get ready. I will be going with

Jasmine applies they the equipment for time travel. Jerry see a

"Do you want to get dinner tonight"

I will take that. Donald your phone as

Jasmine leaves to the next room.
Don looks at Jerry and they both have a look of defeat on their

Okay all ready in 3... 2...
JERRY
I am sorry Don for everything.
JASMINE
1

That never gets old. Quick get in the

We‘re here.

When is your car going to get out of

They said sometime next week. hopefully

Can’t bro I have to study

No you have to come, I am not letting

semester one more party before finals

Look I know what I am telling you are

acing this test. Even then I told you I

(whispering)
You really fucked this one up.

Everything you are studying is right
here look.
Don Looks at the sheet and is in aw

That was some fast business

Jerry holding back tears know that everything is gone. Past Don

Bye Dad

I know

Don see the P Don opening the dresser and looking at the answers
then takes a picture. He calls Jerry.
P DON:

Jerry ya let's go out tonight.
Don looks with sadness to Artum
DON
Lets go
They travel back to the future.

All of them wake up with a head ache

(yelling)
Jasmine, we have to something about

JASMINE
About what.

It's giving me a headache every time I
use it.
JASMINE
Noted

So whats next

You live your life. The same way you

Not quite. In about 2 min it will, time

In mean time Jasmine has some paperwork

Jasmine takes them to the lobby and take out the paper work

For what? For this? Na at least you

what are you going do?

chat_messages.text:
Here is a summary of the screenplay VoltecScript.pdf:

The screenplay centers around two friends named Don and Jerry who are dissatisfied with their lives. Jerry pays for them to use a service called Voltec that allows people to travel back in time and relive memories. However, they break the rules and try to change events in the past to improve their present lives. 

Initially it works - Don wakes up with a successful law career and Jerry as his partner. But Voltec catches on that they altered the timeline and forces them to go back again and undo their changes. Don and Jerry return to their normal unsatisfying lives but with a new perspective. The story explores themes of accepting one's present circumstances versus trying to recreate an idealized past. Ultimately Don decides to move forward in life instead of dwelling on what could have been.
break the screenplay down into locations

Here is a breakdown of the locations in the screenplay:

- Don's apartment: Where Don lives at the start. Jerry visits to convince him to try Voltec.

- Voltec office: The time travel company facility. Don and Jerry go here multiple times to travel to the past.

- Don and Jerry's college dorm room: One of the times they travel back to, when they were in college. 

- Jerry's house: Jerry invites Don over for dinner with his dad after they alter the timeline.

- Don's law firm: After changing the past, Don wakes up here as the owner of a successful law firm.

- Coffee shop: Don and Jerry are captured by Voltec agents here after changing the timeline.

- Voltec lobby: Where Don and Jerry wait after undoing their timeline changes.

- Don's new house: The lavish house Don wakes up in after initially changing the past.

- Intercity Cellphones: Don's unsatisfying job in the original timeline. He quits here after everything goes back to normal.

- Jerry's house: Jerry calls his dad from here at the end to try and reconnect.

So in summary, the main locations are Don and Jerry's homes, Voltec, the college dorm room, Don's offices/workplaces, and public places like the coffee shop. The time travel creates shifts between mundane settings in their regular lives and more fantastical ones after altering time.
are there any plot holes in the story?

Here are some potential plot holes I noticed in the screenplay:

- It's unclear why going back again and just watching the past fixes the timeline changes. Simply observing their past selves shouldn't undo the alterations they made before.

- It's inconsistent that Don and Jerry's memories seem unaffected after the timeline changes back. Logically, they should only remember the original timeline.

- The rules of time travel are vague. Like it's not clear why they turn into their past selves rather than just appearing as observers. Or why changing events takes time to catch up to the present.

- Voltec appears to have no oversight or approval process. Don and Jerry access time travel dangerously easily.

- The consequences for changing the past don't seem severe enough. The fix is simply going back again. There's no lasting punishment.

- Don and Jerry face little resistance or questioning when announcing Jerry as partner. The employees don't react much.

- The motives of Voltec's agents are unclear. They come across as plot devices rather than fully realized characters.

- It's not explained why going back and cheating is such a definitive failure point for Don's life. One incident wouldn't railroad his whole life.

So in summary, the mechanics of time travel in the story are a bit hand-wavy and create logical gaps. The consequences of altering the past also feel quite contained. Tighter rules and greater realism regarding the effects could plug some of those plot holes. But overall it's a fun escapist premise.
can you divide this story into chapters?

Here's one way I would divide this screenplay into chapters:

Chapter 1: Dissatisfied Lives
- Introduces Don and Jerry's mundane lives and dissatisfaction 
- Jerry convinces Don to try Voltec time travel

Chapter 2: Altering the Past
- Don and Jerry go to Voltec and travel back, changing events 
- Returning to the present, their lives are improved 

Chapter 3: Unraveling Changes
- Voltec agents track down Don and Jerry to fix the timeline
- They force Don and Jerry to travel back again to undo changes

Chapter 4: A New Perspective
- After setting the timeline straight, Don and Jerry return 
- They accept their lives with new perspective on trying to recreate the past

Chapter 5: Moving Forward 
- Jerry tries to reconnect with his dad
- Don quits his job, deciding to move forward with life

The chapters follow the overall arc:
1) Introduction
2) Inciting incident/complication (changing the past)
3) Obstacles (fixing changes)
4) Resolutions (acceptance)
5) Denouement (looking forward)

The time travel creates a distinct before, during, and after structure. The chapters focus on the key phases of Don and Jerry's journey - dissatisfaction, altering the past, undoing it, and acceptance.
